parameters:
I can't just leave the two of them behind and go home... I have to do my job properly
for the village's sake.
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = M_Mine
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = M_Mine
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = M_Mine
完了までウェイト = true

This way in... There wasn't a passage like this last time I was here... It looks like
Dario went on ahead through here. We have to catch up...
\SE[19]Damn it... Why do I have to be in this dusty, dirt-covered place...
Ahaha... sorry, Elly. Let's finish the work as quickly as possible and go home, okay?

\SE[17]Ugh... I can only rely on you, big brother... That fatso isn't gonna move properly
anyway... Hah, really, do your best...
\SE[15]That idiot seems to have already gone ahead. Should we chase after him?

A year ago, we encountered a creepy monster here and had to fight it... With Mana's
help, we managed to defeat it somehow, but... Even after becoming adventurers, I
haven't met a monster that strong since.

And, from the day we defeated that monster... Reports kept coming in that many
monsters around the world had lost their ferocity. Around my village, we stopped
seeing goblins and slimes altogether.

Is this just a coincidence? Was that monster actually something like a king that
controlled other monsters... or something? Hmm, am I overthinking it...?
